qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist B for serial #26: denser follow-up on decision, hint and tuple normalization

executionHints.description: Checklist B keeps state-only continuation and focuses on denser helper extraction around decision resolution and hint tuples

d1ResetRequirement.notes: D1 remains reset-sensitive to avoid stale code-step state

D1.description: Add entry helpers for query-missing, match-layer update and input-label projection

D2.description: Introduce reusable unknown-hint helpers for default, v4 and v6 hint paths

D3.description: Extract generic classified-tuple helper and route special/reserved/unknown tuple writers through it

operations.replacement: wc_preclass_apply_classified_tuple(cls, rir, reason, confidence, wc_preclass_class_unknown_hint_literal(), wc_preclass_rir_unknown_compare_literal(), reason_value, wc_preclass_confidence_low_hint_literal());

D4.description: Introduce named special-result helpers and route v4/v6 result helpers through them

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v4_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
	wc_preclass_apply_special_result\(cls, rir, reason, confidence, reason_value\);?
\}

static void wc_preclass_set_v4_private_range_result\(const char\*\* cls, const char\*\* rir, const char\*\* reason, const char\*\* confidence, const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
	wc_preclass_set_special_tuple\(cls, rir, reason, confidence, reason_value\);?
\}

static void wc_preclass_set_v6_branch_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
        const char\*\* rir,?
        const char\*\* reason,?
        const char\*\* confidence,?
        const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
    wc_preclass_set_special_tuple\(cls, rir, reason, confidence, reason_value\);?
\}

static void wc_preclass_set_v6_loopback_result\(const char\*\* cls, const char\*\* rir, const char\*\* reason, const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	\*cls = wc_preclass_class_special_literal\(\);?
	\*rir = wc_preclass_rir_none_literal\(\);?
	\*reason = wc_preclass_v6_loopback_reason_literal\(\);?
	\*confidence = wc_preclass_confidence_high_literal\(\);?
\}
